channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters dumped, 18th April
item.description:
Nitrous oxide canisters are frequently dumped on hammelton road near the junction with college road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hammelton Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping same place different day! CCTV check enforcement, 18th April
item.description:
Reporting every day at same point garbage, mattresses duvets soaked in urine, beds whatever some uncivilised individuals leave here. A laminated board is needed and also fine the responsible of this. Enough is enough!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large metal pole on corner, 18th April
item.description:
A large metal pole (perhaps for holding a washing line) is blocking half of the pavement. This could trip someone up or be used to damage things. It is on the corner of Bevan Road and Rochdale Road on the South side of the junction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bevan Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
Mattresses, furniture, bins are locked and there’s not enough bins. We are dealing with this every single week. It’s disgusting’

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Penton Place, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Large potholes, 18th April
item.description:
These pothole keeps being patched up and open within a month, leaving gravel all other the road. Can you please repair these properly. This road is extremely busy particularly due to current long term diversion

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Ashley Road, Archway, Greater London

item.title: Shop storing contents on pavement blocking access to building, 18th April
item.description:
Shop now storing contents outside on the pavement without license and partly obstructing entrance to residential building

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hackney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing Fly-Tipping Issue – Immediate Action Required, 18th April
item.description:
Dear Peabody, I am writing to formally raise a complaint regarding the ongoing issue of fly-tipping on my street Wallace Close, SE28 8NL in Thamesmead. This has been an issue for over a year now and is continuing to get worse week by week. I am constantly waking up to find rubbish, including mixed waste and cardboard, dumped outside my property. It is unacceptable to have to live in these conditions, and it is having a negative impact on both the appearance of the area and my quality of life. I have reported this issue numerous times previously, yet no effective action appears to have been taken. The lack of response and resolution is extremely frustrating. I am requesting that this matter is addressed as a priority. This includes: - Immediate removal of the current waste - Increased monitoring or enforcement to prevent further fly-tipping - Clear communication on what steps are being taken to resolve this ongoing problem I would appreciate a prompt response outlining what action will be taken and within what timeframe. This situation has gone on far too long and requires urgent attention. Kind regards, Jenna Nurse 8 Wallace close London Se288nl

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallace Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside residential house (next door), 18th April
item.description:
A few days ago but it is creating a nuisance and tripping hazard along this stretch of pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenwood Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
